response.original_title: Du skal aldri møte faren din igjen
response.overview: Ivo (26) is in a fragile psychological state. In search of much-needed support, he turns to his father. However, their meeting is not what Ivo had hoped for, and he leaves to make his appointment with his therapist, Lotte. Despite Lotte’s efforts, Ivo avoids talking about his father. Meanwhile, without Ivo’s knowledge, something is being constructed in the neighboring room. Led by the mysterious therapist Robert and his assistant Isa, they prepare a decisive confrontation they believe Ivo must have with his father.
response.title: You’ll never meet your father again
